ghost_patient_status: Identified by claims algorithm — 2 prior lines, no Carvykti
expected_reasoning: Patient is lenalidomide-naive. Two prior lines (VCD then KCd), neither containing an IMiD. CrCl borderline. Fails CARTITUDE-4 INC-05 (lenalidomide-refractory) and INC-10 (renal function).

documents.author: M. Abramowitz, MD
documents.content:
BM bx: 40% PC, kappa restricted. FISH: del(13q), no high-risk.

DX: PERSISTENT MULTIPLE MYELOMA, 40% PC.

documents.author: R. Singh, MD
documents.content:
73M IgG kappa MM dx 5/2022. ISS-II.

TX HX (transferred care from rural community oncologist 2024, len was avoided due to pt's strong renal disease history):
- L1 (6/2022 - 4/2023): VCD (bortezomib + cyclophosphamide + dex) x6 cycles. Pt was lenalidomide-NAIVE, declined autoSCT (frail/older). Best response PR. PD 4/2023.
- L2 (5/2023 - 1/2026): KCd (carfilzomib + cyclophosphamide + dex). Best response VGPR. PD 12/2025 confirmed BM bx 1/2026.

LENALIDOMIDE STATUS: NEVER EXPOSED. Pt has CKD3 (Cr baseline 1.5) and was managed without IMiDs at community oncologist's preference.

ECOG 1. Lives w/ wife, mostly independent.

PMH: CKD3 (Cr baseline 1.5, eGFR ~38), HTN, DM2.

Labs 2/8/26: Hgb 10.0, ANC 2.0, plt 110. Cr 1.7 (slight bump from baseline 1.5), CrCl ~31. LFTs WNL.

A/P: r/r MM, 2 prior lines, BUT: (1) lenalidomide-NAIVE — fails CARTITUDE-4 INC-05; (2) CrCl ~31 — also fails INC-10. Patient was identified as 'ghost' by claims algorithm but clinical review reveals two disqualifications. Discussed introducing lenalidomide at next line — pt and family will consider given no other path to CAR-T eligibility.
